ashenreach_1.speaker: SIGNPOST
pages: ASHEN REACH. What burns here was born burning. Bring frost.

ashenreach_2.speaker: SIGNPOST
pages: Hexbinders drink your wellspring. Shock them first.

lore_ash.speaker: LORE STONE
pages: It carved sigils no one taught it. The other three sealed it away, and it learned to wait.
